properties.name: format.uima-binary-cas.enabled
properties.description: Enables UIMA binary CAS format import/export support.

properties.name: format.uima-inline-xml.enabled
properties.description: Enables UIMA inline XML format import/export support.

properties.name: format.uima-xmi-struct.enabled
properties.description: Enables structured UIMA XMI format import/export support.

properties.name: format.uima-xmi-xml1-1.enabled
properties.description: Enables UIMA XMI (XML 1.1) format import/export support.

properties.name: format.uima-xmi.enabled
properties.description: Enables UIMA XMI format import/export support.
